series_metadata.series_description: A monthly report compiled by the Investments department that lists completed department activities for the previous calendar month, including a list of investment holdings as of the close of the previous month for accounts managed by the Treasurer's office.

retention_rules.disposition: Electronic: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 6 fiscal years. ; Paper: Retain until conclusion of current fiscal year, and for an additional 6 fiscal years., Electronic: Delete ; Paper: Shred
